chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 06 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.60/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.61/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 30.01.2025 Petitioner, Umar Farooq, is present in person. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. This petition seeks recovery of the dues claimed. Prima facie, the same cannot be entertained in writ jurisdiction. Petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
